text: Heimdall already computes success rate via getTaskSuccessRate() — Option B duplicates existing work
Journal doesn't contain type tags — by_type breakdown can't be computed from current data
Parse failures and stale-recovery failures bypass the journal entirely — journal is not authoritative for all outcomes
Schema is over-designed — 9 analytic concepts for a 2-day-old journal with <20 entries
Thermometer reframing is valid — vision says measurable signal, not self-computed analytics
Timeout calibration is a better next signal than another success rate layer
Existing Heimdall queue metrics have a bug — runtime parsed as duration string
Revised plan has unresolved fork — 'journal or Munin task results' are not interchangeable inputs
Plan bundles three separate jobs (telemetry, metric, publishing) that should be independent
Munin summary needs explicit metadata (computed_at, window, sample_size, source) to be trustworthy
Fix existing Heimdall metric integrity bug before layering new analytics on top
Journal expansion for type tags is scope creep — not needed for timeout calibration
